title: CMO Chitrakoot ASHA Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Posts
short_info: Chief Medical Office Chitrakoot (CMO Chitrakoot) has published the ASHA Worker Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 40 ASHA Worker positions. Candidates within the age range of 25 to 45 years and holding Class 8 pass or equivalent qualification are eligible to apply offline at the official website chitrakoot.nic.in. Preference will be given to married, widow, divorced, or separated women who are permanent residents of the same village. The application process will remain active until 30 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details bel

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: Class 8 pass or equivalent, Permanent resident of the same village, Women aged 25-45 years, Preference to married/widow/divorced/separated women
qualification.details: Class 8 pass or equivalent. Must be a permanent resident of the same village for which the application is being made. Women aged between 25 to 45 years. Preference will be given to married, widow, divorced, or separated women.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Village Health Sanitation and Nutrition Committee meeting Merit list preparation as per guidelines Approval by District Health Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CMO Chitrakoot ASHA Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:chitrakoot.nic.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMO Chitrakoot ASHA recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CMO Chitrakoot ASHA recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the ASHA post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the ASHA post is Class 8 pass or an equivalent examination. Candidates must meet this basic requirement to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the ASHA position?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the ASHA position is between 25 years and 45 years. Both minimum and maximum age criteria must be satisfied by the applicant.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the CMO Chitrakoot ASHA recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the CMO Chitrakoot ASHA recruitment. This applies to all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies for the ASHA post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies announced for the ASHA post by the Chief Medical Office Chitrakoot.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the ASHA position?
faq.answer: The job type for the ASHA position is contractual. This means the employment is for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Who will be given preference for the ASHA post?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to married, widow, divorced, or separated women for the ASHA post, provided they meet all other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the ASHA recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a meeting of the Village Health Sanitation and Nutrition Committee, followed by the preparation of a merit list as per guidelines, and final approval by the District Health Committee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMO/NHM/ASHA Selection/2026-27/25/1.
